name: second-brain-marketplace
description: Tools for building and maintaining an LLM-owned 'second brain' wiki.

plugins.name: build-second-brain
plugins.description: Turn a folder of raw notes into a structured, interlinked second-brain wiki: scaffolds the canonical folder structure (CLAUDE.md, HOME.md, index.md, templates, helper-prompts) and restructures the notes into project/people/event/knowledge/idea pages.
